title: Echinolobium fruticosum
intro: Echinolobium fruticosum, commonly known as Echinolobium, is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae, characterized by its shrub-like growth habit and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory issues, due to its potential health benefits in reducing oxidative stress and improving immune function. Echinolobium fruticosum contains a range of bioactive constituents, including flavonoids, alkaloids, and glycosides, which are believed to be responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made from Echinolobium include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
